name: gatetest
display_name: GateTest — Eyes, Ears & Hands for Claude
description: Give Claude verified eyes (screenshots), ears (Sentry/Datadog/Rollbar errors), and hands (fixes that prove they worked). 120-module scan engine, all inside your AI assistant.
long_description: GateTest is a 120-module code-quality and security gate delivered as an MCP server. It gives your AI assistant capabilities it can't get on its own: screenshot live pages (Eyes), pull real production errors with file:line (Ears), and verify that a fix actually worked by re-scanning and running your tests (Hands). Free tools work with no key: scan any live URL, scan any public GitHub repo, list the 120 modules, get a README badge. A $29/mo subscription unlocks the full scan, AI auto-fix, screenshots, production-error triage, and the verify loop.

gatetest_api_key.title: GateTest API key
gatetest_api_key.description: Optional. Your $29/mo subscription key (gtmcp_...) from gatetest.ai/mcp. Leave blank to use the free tools (scan_url, scan_repo, list_modules, get_badge).
